# @emisso/talk

> Talk with your Software — embeddable AI chatbox powered by Claude Code + Vercel Sandbox.

- Repo: https://github.com/emisso-ai/talk-with-your-software
- License: MIT

## Install

pnpm add @emisso/talk-next @emisso/talk-react @ai-sdk/anthropic ai

## Docs

- [README](https://github.com/emisso-ai/talk-with-your-software/blob/main/README.md)
- [AGENTS.md](https://github.com/emisso-ai/talk-with-your-software/blob/main/AGENTS.md)
- [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/emisso-ai/talk-with-your-software/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md)

## Packages

- @emisso/talk — Core engine (sandbox, classifier, Claude provider, skills)
- @emisso/talk-react — React chat widget (floating launcher, Framer Motion animations)
- @emisso/talk-next — Next.js App Router adapter (createTalkRouter)

## How it works

User asks a question. The engine classifies it (code_lookup, architecture, flow_trace, capability_check, implementation_how, troubleshoot, general_product), spins up a Vercel Sandbox microVM, clones the repo, runs Claude Code (Haiku by default) with Read/Grep/Glob/Bash tools, and returns a structured answer with code snippets and file references.

No RAG. No embeddings. No vector database. Claude reads the actual source code every time.

## API

- `createTalkRouter(config)` — Next.js POST handler. Config: anthropicApiKey, repo, githubToken, model?, maxTurns?, systemPrompt?
- `<TalkWidget endpoint appName? primaryColor? position? greeting? placeholder? launcherIcon? />` — React component
- `navigate(config, request)` — Direct engine call. Returns TalkResult with answer, codeSnippets, filesExplored, costUsd
- `classifyQuery(query, apiKey)` — Classify a question into a QueryCategory
- `estimateCost(model, tokenUsage)` — Estimate USD cost from token counts

## Requirements

- Node.js >= 18
- Anthropic API key
- GitHub personal access token
- Vercel deployment (for Sandbox microVMs)
